title: Cauthon Lifesteal
description: a very epic lifesteal plugin from Cauthon Industries
body:
## Overview
The Cauthon Lifesteal plugin introduces a system where players can steal hearts from others by killing them. Players start with a default number of hearts (configurable), and they can lose or gain hearts in battles. Once a player reaches 0 hearts, they are automatically kicked and marked as requiring revival by an server admin.

## Commands
1. /cfreviveop revive [PlayerName]: This command allows server operators (OPs) to revive a player who has lost all their hearts.
2. /cfreviveop heart: This command gives the player a "Heart Restore" item, which can be used to gain an extra heart.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
